name: Celeste Barber
bio: Celeste Barber is an Australian comedian, actress and writer who rose to global fame in 2015 with celebrity-parody photographs posted to Instagram, where she built an audience of millions. She has since translated that following into touring live comedy, books and television work. In 2020 she led a bushfire-relief fundraiser that became one of the largest social-media appeals on record.

timeline.ev: Wins Funniest Lady on Instagram award
Named one of Variety's Comics to Watch
Bushfire appeal raises over A$50 million
Tours the live show Backup Dancer
